content: Sva ljudska bića rađaju se slobodna i jednaka u dostojanstvu i pravima. Ona su obdarena razumom i sviješću, i trebaju jedni prema drugima postupati u duhu bratstva.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by akvo (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:All human beings are born free and equal in dignity and rights. They are endowed with reason and conscience and should act towards one another in a spirit of brotherhood
